name: Beeswax
description: A complex natural wax secreted by honey bees, forming a breathable occlusive barrier indispensable in balm sticks, lip balms, and protective skin formulations.
chemicalName: Complex mixture; primary component: myricyl palmitate (triacontanyl hexadecanoate)
appearance: Yellow (unrefined) to white (bleached); solid at room temperature; slight honey aroma
solubility: Insoluble in water; soluble in warm oils, chloroform, ether
chemistry: Esters/hydrocarbons/fatty acids. Breathable barrier. Melts at ~145°F — structural firmness for sticks.
warnings: Not vegan. Candelilla wax at half amount as alternative.
